phases.name: Nominate-AI Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This project represents the foundational infrastructure and core components required for the Nominate-AI ecosystem. It encompasses the essential tools and data pipelines needed for data processing, model training, and deployment, ensuring a stable and efficient environment for the development of AI-powered recommendations.

phases.name: Nominate-AI Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This project represents the foundational development phase of the Nominate-AI ecosystem, focusing on establishing the core infrastructure needed for data processing and model deployment. It encompasses the initial setup of essential components like the `maild` and `lochness` scripts, along with critical tooling like `pocket` and `cryptid` which are crucial for the project’s functionality. The focus is on building a stable and scalable system for managing data and potentially supporting AI model development.

phases.name: Data Pipeline & Infrastructure Development
phases.description: This phase focuses on establishing the foundational systems and infrastructure necessary for the Nominate-AI project. It encompasses building the core data pipelines for model training and evaluation, including testing frameworks and documentation. The development prioritizes robust data handling and a scalable infrastructure to support the project’s AI-ML tasks.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & API Components
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational elements of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. It encompasses the core backend systems and APIs required for data processing, model deployment, and user interaction, including the cbapp, system, cbetl, cbai, cbpublic, and cbdistricts components.  It focuses on building the infrastructure necessary for the project to function.

phases.name: Core Image Processing Components
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational building blocks for the Nominate-AI project’s image and video processing capabilities. It encompasses essential components like `cbmodels` (initial model framework), `cbradio` (a radio station for image analysis), `cbsurveys` (tools for collecting survey data), `cbinfra` (infrastructure for model management), `cbfiles` (a library for image processing tasks), and `cbdocs` (a tool for rapid model experimentation). These components are critical to the overall system’s functionality and provide a solid foundation for further development.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & API Development
phases.description: This collection of repositories represents the foundational development of the Nominate-AI project. The `cbintel` repository focuses on the core Python logic and data structures required for the project's backend, while `cbproject` and `cbauth` are dedicated to the TypeScript frontend and authentication components, respectively. `cbos` represents a substantial update to the core system, building a Python-based API for managing the SMS Gateway, and `cbmaintain` and `cbtest` provide smaller, focused projects for testing and refinement.  The `cbsms` repository tackles the SMS gateway API, ensuring seamless communication between the system and mobile devices.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & Tooling
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational systems and tools necessary for the Nominate-AI project. It encompasses the API wrappers, tunnel infrastructure, and core data processing components that underpin the project’s functionality, from document processing to vector search and indexing. The development phase focuses on establishing the necessary infrastructure to support the project's core activities.

milestones.title: cbmobile - 3rd Generation Campaign Brain User Guide
cbtiles - CBTiles - CartoDB tile caching proxy

phases.name: Campaign Brain Development Pipeline
phases.description: This repository represents the core development pipeline for the Nominate-AI project, encompassing the creation and refinement of key components. It spans from initial campaign brain services and CDN assets to a unified CLI and a core library, all culminating in a self-hosted agent memory system.  The project focuses on building a robust and scalable foundation for the Nominate AI platform.

milestones.title: cbgeo - Campaign Brain Brain Geocoding Service (Nominatim-based)
cbcli - Unified CLI for Nominate AI Services (AWS CLI style)
cbcdn - Campaign Brain Self-Hosted CDN Assets
cbscout - Agent Memory and Knowledge Management Service

phases.name: Campaign Brain Ecosystem
phases.description: This project represents the core development of the Nominate-AI system, encompassing a series of interconnected modules focused on campaign management, data ingestion, and monitoring. It’s a phased evolution, starting with a basic Campaign Brain System Manager and progressively building out more sophisticated components like the webhooks, dashboard, and payment system, all designed to support a distributed infrastructure and real-time system health.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Core Development
phases.description: This project represents the foundational development of the Nominate-AI ecosystem, focusing on the core components of the Campaign Brain service catalog and management tools. It includes crucial infrastructure, tools for managing LLM agents, and initial UI elements for monitoring and analysis. The development is centered around robust data management and backend systems needed to support the AI-driven campaign optimization.

milestones.title: cbmcp - MCP server - Campaign Brain service catalog for LLM agents
cbnetwork - Python-based CLI toolkit for OpenWRT VPN/Tor network clusters
RCI-Frontend - TypeScript tool for political radio advertising rates
cbpulse-ui - TypeScript UI for CBPulse business intelligence dashboard
cbfront - Python application for campaign brain front app email integration
vip-frontend - TypeScript application for real-time financial dashboards

phases.name: Phase 11
phases.description: Development of cbradio-ui, cbrouter, cbtemplates and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Services
phases.description: This project represents the core development and maintenance of the Campaign Brain services, encompassing various components crucial for its operation. It involves building a TTS service, a data center infrastructure, and APIs, all while consolidating them into a single codebase. The focus is on providing robust, scalable, and maintainable infrastructure for the AI-ML platform.

milestones.title: cbdc - Campaign Brain Data Center Infrastructure
cbairtable - Campaign Brain Airtable API Wrapper

phases.name: Campaign Brain Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational infrastructure for the Nominate-AI project, encompassing the core tools and systems needed to build and maintain the AI-powered task management and scheduling tool for Campaign Brain. It’s a series of development phases focusing on establishing the key components – from the initial AI-powered task engine to the data ingestion pipeline – ensuring a stable and scalable platform.

milestones.title: cbea - AI-Powered Task Management & Scheduling Tool
cbinfrasays - Infra Says Campaign Brain Infrastructure Standards & Updates
cbloom - Cbloom is a TypeScript-based campaign content and narrative engine focusing on responsive tile layouts and data integration.
automation-spotlight - The `automation-spotlight` repository is a monthly internal newsletter focused on automating tasks with CSS.
cbingest - This GitHub repository, developed by cbingest, is a data ingestion pipeline service focused on automating the extraction of text from Claude JSON resp

phases.name: Campaign Brain Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This project represents the foundational infrastructure for the Campaign Brain application, encompassing essential components for managing and coordinating various resources and data within the system. It focuses on establishing a stable and scalable platform for the core functionalities of the application, including managing Claude skills, providing a user interface, and integrating external data sources. This phase establishes the core building blocks for the entire system.

Recent commits include new features for building, managing, and displaying automation workflows, including templates, stylesheets, and content. Key milestones identified are the addition of the HR document automation and the scaffolding of the project structure.

repos.name: cbingest

Recent commits highlight improvements in extraction, data persistence, UI enhancements, and documentation. Key milestones include implementing full document extraction, adding documentation, and establishing a maintenance pass for the API.
